    1. Config()

Class Config

java.lang.Object
util.Config
public class Config extends Object
A central configuration class that holds global constants for the game. This includes settings for the board dimensions, camera limits, visual rendering, gameplay limits, and coordinate offsets.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final double
    BASE_TILE_HEIGHT
    The base rendering height of a single isometric tile in pixels.
    static final double
    BASE_TILE_WIDTH
    The base rendering width of a single isometric tile in pixels.
    static final int
    BOARD_COLS
    The total number of columns on the game board.
    static final int
    BOARD_ROWS
    The total number of rows on the game board.
    static final double
    CAMERA_PADDING
    The buffer distance in pixels kept on the screen edges to prevent panning entirely off the map.
    static final int[][]
    EIGHT_DIRECTIONS
    Array of coordinate offsets [row, col] representing all 8 compass directions.
    static final int[][]
    FOUR_DIRECTIONS
    Array of coordinate offsets [row, col] representing the 4 cardinal directions
    static final String
    GAME_TITLE
    The main title of the game window.
    static final double
    MAX_ZOOM
    The maximum permitted zoom-in level for the game camera.
    static final double
    MIN_ZOOM
    The minimum permitted zoom-out level for the game camera.
    static final long
    MOVE_DELAY_MS
    The delay in milliseconds between each tile step during a unit's movement animation.
    static final int
    ROUND_LIMIT
    The maximum number of rounds before the game reaches an automatic end condition.
    static final int
    ROUND_TIME_LIMIT
    The maximum time allowed per round in seconds.
    static final double
    UNIT_SCALE
    The visual scaling multiplier applied to unit sprites on the board.

    • BASE_TILE_HEIGHT

      public static final double BASE_TILE_HEIGHT
      The base rendering height of a single isometric tile in pixels.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BASE_TILE_WIDTH

      public static final double BASE_TILE_WIDTH
      The base rendering width of a single isometric tile in pixels. Calculated using a 1.5 ratio to achieve a high-angle isometric perspective.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNIT_SCALE

      public static final double UNIT_SCALE
      The visual scaling multiplier applied to unit sprites on the board.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOVE_DELAY_MS

      public static final long MOVE_DELAY_MS
      The delay in milliseconds between each tile step during a unit's movement animation.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_ZOOM

      public static final double MAX_ZOOM
      The maximum permitted zoom-in level for the game camera.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MIN_ZOOM

      public static final double MIN_ZOOM
      The minimum permitted zoom-out level for the game camera.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CAMERA_PADDING

      public static final double CAMERA_PADDING
      The buffer distance in pixels kept on the screen edges to prevent panning entirely off the map.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROUND_LIMIT

      public static final int ROUND_LIMIT
      The maximum number of rounds before the game reaches an automatic end condition.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROUND_TIME_LIMIT

      public static final int ROUND_TIME_LIMIT
      The maximum time allowed per round in seconds.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FOUR_DIRECTIONS

      public static final int[][] FOUR_DIRECTIONS
      Array of coordinate offsets [row, col] representing the 4 cardinal directions

    • EIGHT_DIRECTIONS

      public static final int[][] EIGHT_DIRECTIONS
      Array of coordinate offsets [row, col] representing all 8 compass directions. Includes the 4 cardinal directions plus the 4 diagonals.
